name: V Golf - East Providence
address: 860A Waterman Ave Unit 4, East Providence, RI 02914
about: V Golf - East Providence is an indoor golf facility featuring four private simulator suites powered by Trackman technology. The facility also houses the Ocean State Golf Academy, offering golf instruction and club fitting services. The venue operates with extended hours, open seven days a week from October through April, and positions itself as offering the best prices in Rhode Island. The experience focuses on providing private bays with Trackman technology and inviting customer service for both individual and group play.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to best-in-industry Trackman technology for precise shot data
Private simulator bays for an uninterrupted golf experience
On-site Ocean State Golf Academy for lessons and club fitting
Claimed to have the best prices in the state of Rhode Island

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary launch monitor and simulator technology used across all 4 bays

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The content does not specify whether club rentals are available, but you are likely expected to bring your own golf clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: There is no information about outside food or drink policies. The venue does not appear to have an on-site kitchen or bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific information on the time required to complete a full 18-hole round on the simulators.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue offers family-friendly simulator packages, making it suitable for families and juniors, though specific child-oriented programs or events are not detailed.
